displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Wall-mounted hygrometer thermometer is suitable for both indoor and outdoor. Mercury free analog wall-mounted hygrometer and thermometer with large, easy-to-read temperature readings ranging from -20 degree Celsius to 50 degree Celsius (0 degree Fahrenheit to 120 degree Fahrenheit). It is used to measure the temperature and humidity in both indoor and outdoor. Wall mounted plastic case comes with built in hanger hole. Recommended to hang on wall at home, workshop, school, kitchen, warehouse, etc. Do not expose thermometer to heavy shock.

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Well-shaped elegant design measuring cup of sturdy plastic. With the well readable measuring scales on the transparent material flour, sugar and liquids can be measured. The measuring of international units like pints cups and fluid ounces is also possible ? ideal for everybody, who likes to rummage the Internet for original recipes. With this measuring cup the elaborate conversion is dropped. Also practical: the non-drip spout enables the non-drip pouring. With rubberized base for a non-slip standing. FEATURES Volume is 1L With six measuring scales (flour, sugar, liquids, pints, cups, fluid ounces) Non-drip spout Made of sturdy plastic Non-slip base.<

They are perfectly suitable for the use on the table and convince with their operation: the oval-shaped handle of the Sterling whisk is easy to use. The high quality stainless steel offers a pleasant stability. With practical eyelet for hanging for the separately available Sterling hook rail. elegant kitchen helper from the Leifheit Sterling series high quality stainless steel in matt and shining finish oval-shaped handle for a pleasant operation perfectly suitable for the serving on the table with practical eyelet for hanging.<

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: The Opinel No 114 Vegetable Knife is a handy knife for chopping up vegetables, from thick greens to carrots to capciums. The blade curves in at the end, to give you better control on the chopping board to cut as desired. Specs: Overall Length: 6.63" (16.84cm) Blade Length: 2.88" (7.32cm) Steel: 12C27 Sandvik stainless (satin finish) Handle: Burgundy Beech wood handle.<

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: The Eco Smart Eco Coco Cutting Board by designed by Architec and manufactured in the USA is an innovative product; durable, light weight and easy to use, this cutting board will quickly earn a starting spot in your kitchen. Made from translucent, recycled, food grade polypropylene (plastic) and coconut shell particles; the bits of coconut shell are suspended in the plastic, creating a natural textured appearance with a smooth surface. By purchasing one of the Eco Smart products you are keeping 20 or more plastic cups out of a landfill.<

metaData.Key Information: The Eco Smart Eco Coco Cutting Board by designed by Architec and manufactured in the USA is an innovative product; durable, light weight and easy to use, this cutting board will quickly earn a starting spot in your kitchen.
